children.name: Just shipped a major refactor of our design system. The new token architecture reduces bundle size by 40% while improving consistency.
children.characters: Just shipped a major refactor of our design system. The new token architecture reduces bundle size by 40% while improving consistency.

children.name: Hot take: the best design systems are the ones nobody notices. They just work.
children.characters: Hot take: the best design systems are the ones nobody notices. They just work.

children.name: We've been using the new Figma DSL pipeline for 3 weeks now. The gap between design and code has never been smaller. Here are my takeaways...
children.characters: We've been using the new Figma DSL pipeline for 3 weeks now. The gap between design and code has never been smaller. Here are my takeaways...

children.name: Reminder: accessibility is not a feature, it's a requirement. Every component you build should work for everyone.
children.characters: Reminder: accessibility is not a feature, it's a requirement. Every component you build should work for everyone.
